title: oenothera walkeri
intro: Oenothera walkeri, also known as Evening Primrose or Western Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family, native to western North America. The plant contains a rich source of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which is an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The medicinal properties of Oenothera walkeri include its ability to soothe skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Herbal preparations of Oenothera walkeri include capsules, oil, and tea, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
